confirm_logout: Are you sure you want to log out?
supervisor_jisr_reviews_subtitle: Review student submissions in the Jisr program. Each student appears in one card with all submitted tasks and uploaded files inside it.
redirecting_to_jisr_reviews: You are being redirected to the direct review page.
no_jisr_submissions_desc: When a student submits a Jisr task, it will appear here for review.
no_files_for_task: No files uploaded for this task.
accepted_feedback_placeholder: Write your note to the student after approval...
rejected_feedback_placeholder: Explain what the student needs to improve...
solution_returned_success: Solution returned to the student with feedback.
default_accept_feedback: Well done, the solution has been approved.
trello_integration_subtitle: Connect the company's Trello account and sync cards as student tasks.
trello_token_saved_securely: The token is saved automatically in the background and encrypted inside the system.
trello_connect_hint: Click the button and Trello will open normally. After approval, you will return to the system and the token will be saved automatically without copying or typing it.
login_to_trello_connect: Log in to Trello and Connect Account
save_valid_token_first: Connect a valid Trello account first, then test the connection.
trello_task_rules_title: Rules for Creating Tasks in Trello
trello_task_rules_intro: Create the card inside the real Trello list linked to the program, then sync from here.
trello_task_rule_all_students: If you want the task for all training students, create the card normally in Trello and it will appear automatically.
trello_task_rule_specific_student: If you want it for one specific student only, write in the title or description: student: student@email.com or student_id: 123456.
assignment_mode_all: All accepted students in this training
assignment_mode_marker: Only by student marker inside the card
assignment_mode_hint: This option controls who sees new cards if you do not add `student:` inside the Trello card.
no_approved_students_in_training: There are no approved students in this training right now.
trello_email_mismatch: The Trello account email must match the company account email in the system.
trello_missing_oauth_data: Trello did not return the required connection data. Try connecting again.
trello_session_expired: The connection session expired. Click Connect Trello again from the same browser.
trello_profile_failed: Approval succeeded, but reading Trello account data failed.
trello_oauth_failed: Approval succeeded, but saving the connection failed. Check the Laravel log for the reason.
trello_connected_successfully: Trello connected successfully and the token was saved in the background.
trello_complete_failed: Could not complete Trello connection. Check the code and try again.
select_at_least_one_student: Select at least one student when using selected-students mode.
confirm_disconnect_trello_account: The Trello account will be disconnected from the system. Are you sure?
add_student_desc: Create a student account directly under your supervision. The student will be linked to your supervisor code automatically.
confirm_disconnect: Are you sure you want to disconnect this link?
manual_token_help: The company needs a token from its own Trello account. API Key can be left empty to use the system key.
leave_empty_system_key: Leave empty to use the system key
do_not_put_email_here: Do not put the email here. This field is only for the long API key and can be left empty.
paste_trello_token: Paste the token you got from Trello
trello_pin_prompt: After clicking Allow in Trello, copy the approval code shown there and paste it here. This is not a token, only a temporary code to generate the token in the background.
trello_connection_cancelled: Connection cancelled. Click the button again if you want to retry.
training_tasks_workspace_intro: The company creates tasks, the student only sees their own tasks, and each submission and evaluation is saved separately per student.
company_tasks_from_trello_desc: Connect the Trello board and sync cards, then grade each task from the task list below. The company final score is calculated automatically from task grades.
company_final_evaluation_desc: These students have finished their training period. Evaluate each student with a final score and note so the result can be completed with the supervisor evaluation.
company_final_note_placeholder: Write your final note about the student's performance
create_task_from_system: Create a Task from the System
create_task_from_system_desc: Select the training and students inside the website, and a Trello card will be created automatically.
label: Label
no_students_in_selected_training: No students in the selected training.
tasks_for_you_only: These tasks are assigned to you only.
each_card_represents_student_task: Each card represents one student's task with its submission and evaluation.
task_solution_placeholder: Write a summary of the solution or work link
training_workspace_load_failed: Could not load the training workspace.
task_created_successfully: Task created successfully. Each student received a private copy for submission and evaluation.
task_submitted_successfully: Task submitted and sent to the company and supervisor.
company_final_evaluation_save_failed: Could not save the company final evaluation.
